Social Pall Mall Cosmetic Instagram Pall Mall Medical Instagram Pall Mall Gender Instagram

Private Healthcare & Diagnostics
Pall Mall is a doctor-led, patient-centred healthcare provider delivering fast, expert care across medical, diagnostic and cosmetic services. No long waits, no compromises and no NHS referral required.
Privately owned hospital Convienient clinic locations Personalised treatment plans and surgery options Flexible Payment Plans

View Special Offers

Trustpilot

How can we help?
Medical Services Cosmetic Surgery Specialists Blood Tests Scanning & Imaging Gender Affirmation Surgery 50% Full Body Scans Our Locations

See why patients choose Pall Mall

Everything was great !! From communication to book appointments to follow up documents everything was always at a good pace , and always explained with care Lucas

“At Pall Mall Medical, consultations are private, respectful, and entirely patient-led. Labiaplasty isn’t about changing who you are, it’s about improving everyday comfort and confidence.”

"I've never felt so good before because I can finally be 100% myself, and I'll never be insecure about any photos taken of me anymore." Amelia, Pall Mall Rhinoplasty patient

"Thank you all at Pall Mall , you really have changed my life and now I have come to the end of my life long battle with weight." Racheal, Pall Mall patient

Healthcare & blood testing, when you need answers
We help people navigate health concerns with expert guidance, assessment and support. Whether you're visiting one of our specialist clinicians, from Dermatology to Gynaecology, or checking in on your health with one of our 1,500+ accredited blood tests, we make it easy to get the answers you need.
No NHS referral needed & same day appointments Consultant-led specialist care Over 1,500 accredited blood tests with lab-certified results within days Accessible healthcare - finance, insurance or self-pay

Specialist medical services & blood tests
Dermatology Services

Women's Health clinic

View all Medical services

View all blood tests

Leading experts in cosmetic surgery
Looking and feeling like yourself, at your very best, is something we believe everyone deserves. Our GMC registered surgeons combine surgical excellence with a genuinely compassionate approach, supporting you from your very first call right through to attentive 2 years aftercare.
Rated Excellent on TrustPilot - trusted by thousands 0% finance options with private en-suite recovery rooms 24/7 nurse helpline - real support whenever you need it Privately owned hospital - the same dedicated nurses with you from day one

Cosmetic Surgery
Breast Enlargement
Explore your options with breast implants, fat transfer or the innovative Preserve
Tummy Tuck Surgery

Rhinoplasty | Nose Job Surgery
Explore your options with our specialist cosmetic surgeons during a FREE no-obligation consultation
View all Cosmetic Surgery

Fast access to diagnostic scans
When you need answers, our advanced imaging services, including MRI, CT, ultrasounds and more, give your the clearest possible view of what's happening inside your body. With appointments seven days a week, getting scanned has never been more accessible.
No waiting lists with self-referral, 7 days a week Every scan reviewed by a qualified radiologist, not AI Calm, private scanning suites designed to put you at ease Peace of mind - accurate, early insight into your health when it matters most

Scanning services
MRI Scans

Full Body MRI scans | From £795
Upgrade to a full body scan package for the ultimate health MOT
CT Scans

View all Scans

Your partner for gender affirmation surgery
Your journey deserves to be met with care, respect, and zero compromise. Our specialist gender surgeons provide care built on dignity and genuine understanding. With virtual and in-person consultations, a comprehensive aftercare programme, and flexible finance options, we're with you every step of the way.
Specialist gender surgeons with comprehensive aftercare Dedicated patient coordinator with you from first call to final follow-up Virtual & in-person consultations Flexible finance - spread the cost of your care

Gender affirming surgery
Gender-Affirming Mastectomy Top Surgery

Gender-Affirming Breast Augmentation Surgery

Patient Stories

We have experience of delivering 5 star services to over 1,000 patients every year.
This is why our patients rate us Excellent on Trustpilot.
Trustpilot

Your team of trusted specialists
Great care starts with great people. Our team of specialist surgeons and consultants bring years of expertise and a shared passion for putting patients first — whatever your journey with us looks like.

© Pall Mall Medical 2026. All rights reserved. Pall Mall Medical (Manchester) Limited is registered in England and Wales No 06980523. We are a credit broker and not a lender. Pall Mall Medical is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority FRN 756371. Credit is subject to age and status. Any late or missed repayment may have serious consequences and your credit rating may be affected which could make it more difficult to obtain credit in the future.Pall Mall Medical (Manchester) Limited offers both regulated and unregulated products. The interest free plans which are repayable within 12 months and in no more than 12 instalments are not regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. Unregulated plans are not covered by the Financial Ombudsman Service. Please note, calls to and from Pall Mall Medical may be recorded for training and monitoring purposes.

July Special Offers
Proactive Care. Exclusive Offers.
Our latest offers are designed to support proactive, preventative healthcare and help you take control of your wellbeing. With a focus on early detection, specialist insight, and long-term health management, these services provide clarity and reassurance across key areas of health. From advanced MRI imaging and neurodiversity testing to comprehensive blood tests and health screens, plus dedicated women's and men's health assessments. Limited time only

Explore Our Offers
50% off Platinum Full Body MRI 57% off Silver Full Body MRI 10% off a Single Area MRI 10% off Moderate ADHD Testing 20% off an Ultimate Health Screen 20% off Cancer Checks

Trustpilot

50% Off Full Body MRI Scan (Platinum Package)
NOW £1,495
was £2,995 Our Platinum package is perfect for patients who would like a comprehensive and detailed picture of their general health, including a thorough check across the brain, abdomen, pelvis and spine using a non-invasive and radiation free MRI scan, alongside an extensive range of blood tests covering inflammation, organ function, cardiac risk, and cancer markers, plus a detailed follow up report and a 15 minute follow up call with one of our GP's.

See a breakdown of what’s included: The Platinum Brain and Body MRI scan is looking for and is able to detect pathology in the vital organs as follows: Head / neck  Major blood vessel abnormalities Evidence of intracranial pathology or aneurysms Cerebral infarctions or haemorrhage Integrity and patency of carotid arteries Tumours, lesions or vascular malformations.

Abdomen Large tumours in the liver, kidneys, pancreas, and gall bladder Significant liver structural disease (for example large cysts or masses) Adrenal tumours Abdominal aortic aneurysm Malignancy, tumours or obstruction in the liver, kidneys, pancreas, and gall bladder Gall stones Overview of the gastrointestinal tract for inflammation, large tumours or obstruction Assessment of cysts or masses
Pelvis Large tumours or masses involving the uterus, ovaries, or bladder Uterine fibroids and endometrial masses or polyps Ovarian cysts and ovarian tumours (for female patients) Prostate, rectum or bladder pathology, abnormalities or tumours (for male patients) Pelvic masses causing pressure or displacement of surrounding structures Assessment of the bladder and rectum for signs of pathology or significant structural abnormalities Cysts or solid masses within pelvic organs Assessment for abnormalities in pelvic bones and soft tissues

Spine Spinal degeneration or disc prolapse / Large disc herniations Compression fractures Entire spinal cord and vertebral column / Vertebral collapse Intervertebral discs Spinal cord compression / significant nerve compression Spinal tumours or other lesions. Blood & Other Tests
Other Advanced inflammation test Bone and Iron screen Calcium screen Muscle breakdown test Anaemia risk (full blood count) Liver, kidney and thyroid function test Full cholesterol (lipid) screen Diabetes risk (Random blood sugar and diabetes risk screen (HBA1C)) Essential vitamins check (D-OH, B12, red cell folate) Prostate Cancer ( male ) - PSA test Ovarian Cancer ( female ) – CA125 test Standard cardiac testing (PLAC test) Advanced cardiac testing – Resting ECG

Terms and Conditions To claim this offer, please quote  PLATINUMBB  at the time of booking. Offer valid on a Platinum Full Body MRI scan only, when booked between 01   July  and 3 1   July  2026.
The appointment includes GP time for internal referral and a follow-up call, as well as radiographer time to carry out the scan and provide results.
Appointments may be scheduled up to 30 days after the offer end date. This offer is not valid for any   subsequent  referrals or appointments. A minimum of 48 hours’ cancellation notice is  required. Patients must be aged 18 or over.

Enquire Now

The process How it works
From booking to results in four simple steps - no delays, no waiting list. 1
Choose your scan package
Opt for a quick self-referral online or speak to our GP - our team reviews & confirms your scan and appointment within 24hrs.
2
Attend your scan
At our Private diagnostics centre. Most scans take 60–90 minutes. Our team will put you at ease.
3
Get your results
A consultant radiologist reviews your scan and produces a detailed written report within 5-10 working days.
4
Discuss next steps
Receive a GP call to walk through the findings. If anything needs follow-up, we guide you through it.

Most patients are booked within 1–2 days of enquiring. Appointments available 7 days a week.

Exclusive July Offer
EXTRA £100 OFF a Full Body MRI Scan (Silver Package)
SAVE £905
was £1,600 | NOW £695
Our Silver Package is ideal for patients wanting clearer insight into their general health using a non-invasive and radiation free MRI scan of the brain, abdomen and pelvis, with the option to add a GP follow-up call upon request for an additional fee.

See a breakdown of what’s included: The Silver Brain and Body MRI scan is looking for and is able to detect pathology in the vital organs as follows: Head / neck Major blood vessel abnormalities Evidence of intra cranial pathology or aneurysms Cerebral infarctions or haemorrhage Integrity and patency of carotid arteries Tumours, lesions or vascular malformations.
Abdomen Large tumours in the liver, kidneys, pancreas, and gall bladder Significant liver structural disease (for example large cysts or masses) Adrenal tumours Abdominal aortic aneurysm Malignancy, tumours or obstruction in the liver, kidneys, pancreas, and gall bladder Gall stones Overview of the gastrointestinal tract for inflammation, large tumours or obstruction Assessment of cysts or masses.
Pelvis Large tumours or masses involving the uterus, ovaries, or bladder Uterine fibroids and endometrial masses or polyps Ovarian cysts and ovarian tumours (for female patients) Prostate, rectum or bladder pathology, abnormalities or tumours (for male patients) Pelvic masses causing pressure or displacement of surrounding structures Assessment of the bladder and rectum for signs of pathology or significant structural abnormalities Cysts or solid masses within pelvic organs Assessment for abnormalities in pelvic bones and soft tissues

Terms and Conditions To claim this offer, please quote  SILVERBB  at the time of booking. Offer valid on a Silver Full Body MRI scan only, when booked between 01   July  and 3 1   July 2026 as a self-referral.
Does not include a GP time for internal referral or a follow-up call. The appointment includes radiographer time to carry out the scan and provide results. Patients who wish to add a GP referral call or a GP follow-up call may do so for an additional £50, payable at the time of booking. Appointments may be scheduled up to 30 days after the offer end date. This offer is not valid for any subsequent referrals or appointments. A minimum of 48 hours' cancellation notice is required. Patients must be aged 18 or over.

Enquire Now

10% off a Single Area MRI
Now from £249
Was from £249 MRI Scans provide a high level of accuracy, helping in the early detection of conditions or injuries affecting almost any part of the body, including the brain, bones, blood vessels and internal organs. They can also be used to monitor ongoing treatment. An MRI Scan uses a combination of magnetic fields and radio waves to generate detailed images of the inside of your body. Unlike X-rays, MRI Scans do not use any forms of radiation. It is a safe procedure and you will not be exposed to the harmful effects of radiation.
Terms & Conditions To claim this offer, please quote  MRI10  at the time of booking. Offer valid on a Platinum Full Body MRI scan only, when booked between 01 July and 31 July 2026.
The appointment includes GP time for internal referral and a follow-up call, as well as radiographer time to carry out the scan and provide results.
Appointments may be scheduled up to 30 days after the offer end date. This offer is not valid for any subsequent referrals or appointments. A minimum of 48 hours’ cancellation notice is required. Patients must be aged 18 or over.

Enquire Now

Single area scan options

Foot & Ankle NOW £224.10

Pelvis NOW £349.20

Knee NOW £349.20

Brain NOW £349.20

Bowel NOW £349.20

Hip NOW £389.70

10% off Moderate ADHD Testing Appointments
NOW £652.50
was £725 Our Moderate ADHD Testing appointment is perfect for adults who suspect they may have ADHD and would like a comprehensive, in-depth assessment, including a 90 minute in-person consultation using the DIVA-5 diagnostic tool, a physical exam and review of family history, conducted by a UK-registered psychiatrist or specialist ADHD nurse, with a fully explained treatment plan should a diagnosis be confirmed.
What do ADHD symptoms look like in adults? ADHD symptoms in adults can be categorised as inattentive, hyperactive and impulsive. You are likely to have started seeing symptoms earlier in life and develop over childhood and adolescence but could have been ignored or dismissed as something else. Inattentive Symptoms: Struggling to focus on tasks or conversations. Becoming easily distracted by surrounding stimuli. Frequently forgetting appointments, deadlines, or daily tasks. Difficulty managing time, planning, or staying organised. Misplacing important items like keys, wallets, or documents. Making careless errors in work or everyday activities. Trouble completing tasks or following detailed instructions.
Hyperactive Symptoms: Feeling restless or unable to relax, often described as being "on edge." Talking excessively, often interrupting others unintentionally. Constantly feeling the urge to move, even in inappropriate settings.
Impulsive Symptoms: Acting without thinking about long-term consequences. Interrupting conversations or overstepping social boundaries. Struggling with patience, such as waiting in queues.
These symptoms can significantly affect work performance, relationships, and daily life. Early diagnosis and tailored treatments like behavioural therapy or medication can help adults with ADHD manage these challenges and enhance their quality of life.

Terms and Conditions To claim this offer, please quote  ADHD10  at the time of booking. Prices based on valid appointments booked with Dr Anand only, when booked between 01 July and 31 July 2026. Prices shown may vary if booked with other clinicians / Prices vary by clinican.
These offers are not valid on any subsequent referrals or appointments. Follow up appointments are not included. Appointments available at selected Pall Mall locations, call for more information and to book. 48 hours cancellation notice required. Patient must be 18 or older

Enquire Now

20% off our Ultimate Health Screen
NOW £519.20
was £649 A detailed and discreet, personal health assessment performed by one of our private GPs to combine your medical history, lifestyle factors and a physical examination with some of the most advanced diagnostic testing available including a PLAC & Q-Risk 3 cardiac assessment to predict your risk or coronary heart disease, an advanced HbA1c diabetes test to look for signs of metabolic disease, a PSA check for prostate cancer or CA125 check for ovarian cancer, a detailed review of your liver and kidney function in-depth thyroid tests, essential vitamins check such as Vitamin D and B12, important if you're suffering from weakness, fatigue or brain fog.
What's Included? Heart Health What's checked: PLAC test, cholesterol, Q-Risk Why it matters: Detects cardiovascular risk early
Diabetes What's checked: HbA1c Why it matters: Identifies pre-diabetes and metabolic issues
Liver & Kidney What's checked: Organ function blood tests Why it matters: Detects hidden dysfunction
Hormones What's checked: Thyroid profile Why it matters: Identifies fatigue and hormone imbalance
Vitamins What's checked: Vitamin D & B12 Why it matters: Checks causes of low energy and brain fog
Cancer Screening What's checked: PSA or CA125 Why it matters: Assesses specific cancer risks

Terms & Conditions To claim this offer, please quote  ULTIMATE20  at the time of booking. Offer valid on a Pall Mall Ultimate Health Screen appointment only, when booked between 01 July and 31Ju ly 2026.
The appointment is with a nurse or phlebotomist for blood collection only. Appointments may be scheduled up to 30 days after the offer end date. This offer is not valid for any subsequent referrals or appointments. A minimum of 48 hours’ cancellation notice is required. Patients must be aged 18 or over.

Enquire Now

20% off Cancer Checks for Male and Female
NOW from £99.20

Prostate PSA Blood Test | NOW £99.20 was £124 It's a simple blood test that measures the level of PSA in your blood - a protein produced by the prostate gland. Elevated levels can indicate prostate cancer, though they can also point to other conditions such as an enlarged prostate or inflammation.

Ovarian Cancer CA125 Blood Test | NOW £146.40 was £183 A blood test can detect the CA125 protein in your blood may indicate the presence of ovarian cancer. Early detection can increase the survival rate to 90% of women. While symptoms don't automatically mean you have ovarian cancer, it is advisable to be aware of them and be tested if they don't seem to subside.

Terms and Conditions To claim this offer, please quote  CCHECK20   at the time of booking. Offer valid on   a CA125 Ovarian Cancer Blood test   or PSA Blood Test   only, when booked between 01   July   and 31   July   2026.
The appointment is with a nurse or phlebotomist for blood collection only. Appointments may be scheduled up to 30 days after the offer end date. This offer is not valid for any   subsequent  referrals or appointments. A minimum of 48 hours’ cancellation notice is  required. Patients must be aged 18 or over.
